behavior_summary: This script implements the Sorcerer NPC's identity bookkeeping, conversation, short barks, and idle/activity scheduling.

A family of selector helpers (U8P_SORCERER::func0080, U8P_SORCERER::func0147, U8P_SORCERER::func020E, U8P_SORCERER::func02D5) map an input selector string (this) to per-variant storage slots (e.g., cardasMet, cardasName, cardasJob, cardasAvaName) and record a helper reference in temp for the matched Sorcerer variant (Cardas, Daemos, Kothius, Mentar, Tallon, Emrichol).

U8P_SORCERER::func05EC is the primary player-facing dialogue routine: it builds and presents a menu, personalizes lines with the player's name, branches widely on menu choices and selector names, reads per-variant data to produce variant-specific responses, sets conversation-related flags, and calls an external METHOD::func15E7 to carry out an option action.
Short utterances are produced by U8P_SORCERER::func039C (variant-aware short descriptor) and U8P_SORCERER::func1B69 (very short reactive bark).

Idle and sensing behaviors are managed by U8P_SORCERER::func1B8F (randomized idle timer, spawn npcIdleWander, and schedule barks) with entry from U8P_SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer. U8P_SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity cancels the scheduled activity reference.
notable_control_flow: Selector pattern: many functions strcmp 'this' (input string) against a fixed set of sorcerer names and on match write a per-variant global and temp = this_hi; else clear temp.

Conversation branching: U8P_SORCERER::func05EC composes a menu (MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuUnion/MenuRemove), presents it via Ask, captures selection with SuspendAssign, then uses strcmp on the captured choice/local selector to choose dialogue branches and side effects.

Idle scheduling uses a random bucket (FREE::randomInRange / FREE::randomInRange0) to decide whether to spawn short barks or reschedule timers, and will spawn METHOD::npcIdleWander for wandering behavior.

Detection path (U8P_SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer) short-circuits on death, otherwise either sets the NPC target to the player (Npc::setTarget) if avatarMasterSorcerer is set, or spawns the idle/activity routine (U8P_SORCERER::func1B8F).
open_questions: What exact gameplay effect does METHOD::func15E7 invoked from U8P_SORCERER::func05EC perform (quest state, item transfer, trigger)?
How are the per-variant globals (cardasMet, cardasName, cardasJob, cardasAvaName) initialized in normal game flow (who calls the selector helpers and when)?
Is temp a localized runtime helper only, or is it persisted/inspected by other scripts/mechanics beyond this file?
What precise UI/gump semantics are expected in the dead-NPC branch of U8P_SORCERER::func05EC (Item::openGump / Item::closeGump conditions)?

main_function.name: U8P_SORCERER::func0080
main_function.purpose: Identify which named Sorcerer variant an input selector string represents; set the corresponding '<name>Met' storage and store a helper reference (temp = this_hi) or clear temp when no match is found.
entry_conditions: Invoked with 'this' set to a selector string to classify (likely called during NPC setup, dialogue assembly, or when external code reports a variant name).

function_map.name: U8P_SORCERER::func039C
function_map.role: short monologue/bark formatter using per-variant data and Npc::isDead to choose phrasing

function_map.name: U8P_SORCERER::func05EC
function_map.role: primary dialogue handler: build menus, capture player choice, branch responses, call METHOD::func15E7

function_map.name: U8P_SORCERER::func1B69
function_map.role: very short reactive bark emitter (suspends after a single Bark)

function_map.name: U8P_SORCERER::func1B8F
function_map.role: idle/activity scheduler: random timers, set flags, spawn npcIdleWander and timed callbacks

function_map.name: U8P_SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer
function_map.role: called on player detection: check death, set target (if avatarMasterSorcerer) or spawn idle/activity routine

function_map.name: METHOD::func15E7
function_map.role: external action invoked from dialogue (unknown side effect)

internal_calls.purpose: spawn short reactive barks as part of randomized idle behavior
start/reset the NPC idle/activity routine when the player is detected (spawned)

external_calls.purpose: carry out an action tied to a conversation menu choice (exact effect unknown from data)
compute randomized delay/timer values for idle scheduling
pick a small random bucket to select which idle utterance/behavior to run
spawn NPC wandering behavior as part of idle routine
assign the player as the NPC's target when avatarMasterSorcerer is set
choose 'dead' vs 'alive' wording for short descriptor barks
cancel/reset the previously spawned activity/process reference

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: controls selection of alternate (often regretful or fatalistic) dialogue in U8P_SORCERER::func05EC

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: when true, U8P_SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer will set the player as target instead of just spawning idle behavior

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: prevents U8P_SORCERER::func1B69 from barking when another conversation is active

reads.name: cardasMet / daemosMet / kothiusMet / mentarMet / tallonMet / emricholMet
reads.likely_effect: per-variant 'met' markers read by U8P_SORCERER::func05EC and U8P_SORCERER::func039C to choose variant-specific responses

reads.name: cardasName / daemosName / kothiusName / mentarName / tallonName / emricholName
reads.likely_effect: per-variant name storage read to personalize or choose phrasing in dialogue

reads.name: cardasJob / daemosJob / kothiusJob / mentarJob / tallonJob / emricholJob
reads.likely_effect: per-variant job/role strings read to influence descriptive lines

reads.name: cardasAvaName / daemosAvaName / kothiusAvaName / mentarAvaName / tallonAvaName / emricholAvaName
reads.likely_effect: avatar-facing names read to produce player-visible name lines

writes.name: cardasMet / daemosMet / kothiusMet / mentarMet / tallonMet / emricholMet
writes.likely_effect: set to indicate which Sorcerer variant 'this' refers to (written by U8P_SORCERER::func0080)

writes.name: cardasName / daemosName / kothiusName / mentarName / tallonName / emricholName
writes.likely_effect: written by U8P_SORCERER::func0147 to store variant name references

writes.name: cardasJob / daemosJob / kothiusJob / mentarJob / tallonJob / emricholJob
writes.likely_effect: written by U8P_SORCERER::func020E to store variant job/role references

writes.name: cardasAvaName / daemosAvaName / kothiusAvaName / mentarAvaName / tallonAvaName / emricholAvaName
writes.likely_effect: written by U8P_SORCERER::func02D5 to store avatar-facing name references

writes.name: temp
writes.likely_effect: helper slot set to this_hi on successful selector match and cleared to 0 on no-match; used as a transient reference across selector helpers

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the Sorcerer NPC's identity bookkeeping, conversation, short barks, and idle/activity scheduling.
